title: centella erecta
intro: Centella erecta, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella erecta include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced stress levels. Centella erecta can be consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
